Assemble Your Crew
Connect your Nintondo wallet to see your Super Bell Alliance crew, earn badges, and climb the ranks. The more you collect, the higher you rank!
How Assemble Works
01

Collect Heroes

Mint or buy Super Bell Alliance heroes. Each hero you hold contributes to your crew and earns you points.

02

Earn Badges

Complete special collection sets to earn exclusive badges — Blockchain Alliance, Companion Master, Rarity Hunter and more.

03

Climb the Ranks

Accumulate points to rise through ranks: Recruit → Soldier → Captain → Commander → Legend.
